ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 %s 插件 v%s ...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 %s 插件 v%s ...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: One of your code blocks includes unescaped HTML. This is a potentially serious security risk.
ast.target: 您的一个代码块包含未转义的 HTML。这是一个潜在的严重安全风险。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unsupported OS to copy a file!
ast.target: 不支持复制文件的操作系统！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The conversion result cannot be opened due to incorrect states!
ast.target: 由于状态不正确，无法打开转换结果！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The conversion result has already opened!

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlights specific lines and/or line ranges.
ast.target: 高亮显示特定行和/或行范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line number at the beginning of code lines.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show hidden characters such as tabs and line breaks.
ast.target: 显示隐藏字符，如制表符和换行符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes tokens link to WebPlatform.org documentation. The links open in a new tab.
ast.target: 使标记链接到 WebPlatform.org 文档。链接将在新标签页中打开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the highlighted language in code blocks (inline code does not show the label).
ast.target: 在代码块中显示高亮语言（内联代码不显示标签）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch content with JSONP and highlight some interesting content (e.g. GitHub/Gists or Bitbucket API).
ast.target: 通过 JSONP 获取内容并高亮显示一些有趣的内容（例如 GitHub/Gists 或 Bitbucket API）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds special CSS classes for each keyword for fine-grained highlighting.
ast.target: 为每个关键字添加特殊的 CSS 类，以实现细粒度高亮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds a small inline preview for colors in style sheets.
ast.target: 在样式表中为颜色添加一个小的内联预览。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Previewers for angles, colors, gradients, easing and time.
ast.target: 角度、颜色、渐变、缓动和时间的预览器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically loads the needed languages to highlight the code blocks.
ast.target: 自动加载所需的语言以高亮显示代码块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prevents custom markup from being dropped out during highlighting.
ast.target: 防止自定义标记在高亮过程中被丢弃。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display a command line with a prompt and, optionally, the output/response from the commands.
ast.target: 显示一个带有提示符的命令行，并可选地显示命令的输出/响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write markup without having to escape anything.
ast.target: 无需转义任何内容即可编写标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Supports multiple operations to normalize whitespace in code blocks.
ast.target: 支持多种操作来规范化代码块中的空白。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 高亮显示 data-URI 内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attach a toolbar for plugins to easily register buttons on the top of a code block.
ast.target: 附加一个工具栏，方便插件在代码块顶部注册按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a button that copies the code block to the clipboard when clicked.
ast.target: 添加一个按钮，点击时将代码块复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A button in the toolbar of a code block adding a convenient way to download a code file.
ast.target: 代码块工具栏中的一个按钮，提供便捷的代码文件下载方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlights the code inside diff blocks.
ast.target: 高亮显示 diff 块内的代码。
